nasb.text: Therefore Saul removed him from his presence and appointed him as his commander of a thousand; and he went out and came in before the people.

esv.text: So Saul removed him from his presence and made him a commander of a thousand. And he went out and came in before the people.

cnv.text: 因此掃羅使大衛離開自己，立他作千夫長，大衛就領導眾民出入。

ccb.text: 他把大卫调离自己身边，立为千夫长，让他领兵作战。
